headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 18, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Drew Rasmussen earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Marlins' offense with a home run and 2 RBI. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles took down the Washington Nationals 7-3, with Gunnar Henderson leading the charge at the plate. The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 6-0 victory behind Zack Wheeler's 7.0 innings of shutout baseball.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain. Los Angeles Dodgers left-hander Jack Dreyer has also been placed on the 15-day injured list with left shoulder discomfort. Other teams have also reported injuries, including the Chicago Cubs, Detroit Tigers, Pittsburgh Pirates, Cincinnati Reds, Toronto Blue Jays, and Tampa Bay Rays.

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired left-hander Eric Lauer in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. The Athletics traded center fielder Junior Perez to the Chicago White Sox for left-hander Jackson Nove, while also trading right-hander Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams. The Athletics also traded right-hander Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins in 3-6 Thriller**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Drew Rasmussen earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Marlins' offense with a home run and 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Nationals 7-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Gunnar Henderson leading the charge at the plate. Henderson's impressive performance included four hits, one home run, and two RBIs, while Anthony Nunez earned the win with 1.1 scoreless innings of relief.

top_news.title: **Phillies Shut Out Pirates 6-0**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 6-0 victory. Zack Wheeler led the way on the mound, pitching 7.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Braves Rout Red Sox 8-1**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Boston Red Sox, securing an 8-1 victory. Grant Holmes led the Braves' pitching effort, throwing 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Donovan on Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners have placed third baseman Brendan Donovan on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026. Donovan's status on the injured list is a result of a recent update.

top_news.title: **Lauer Joins Dodgers in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays traded LHP Eric Lauer to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash on May 17, 2026.
